mnemonics: RELIABLE AI: Rightly Executed, Legally & Intentionally Aligned, Beneficial And Lawfully Ethical
keyPoints: Reliable AI produces consistent and predictable results under specified conditions.
It requires robustness against adversarial attacks and errors in real-world environments.
Reliability encompasses technical performance, safety, and ethical alignment with human values.
commonMistakes: Equating reliability with mere technical accuracy, ignoring safety and ethical dimensions.
Assuming an AI system reliable in a lab setting will perform identically in a complex, real-world context.
